query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, reason
FROM blackout_dates
WHERE date >= '2026-07-01' AND date <= '2026-12-31'
ORDER BY date;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ya87wqF7ZWNWxEH.1126fdfe9484 --database 8TTpjTbwNRkm8QcJp9ko4t --execute
